summary: Data Architecture Refactor Testing Complete. All 19 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified for all 3 roles (athlete, coach, director). MongoDB direct queries working correctly, TTL-cached derived data refreshing properly, and indexes created on startup.
critical_code_review_comments: athlete_store.py correctly implements async DB-direct reads with get_all() and get_by_id() querying MongoDB directly
TTL-cached derived data pattern working correctly with 30-second refresh interval
MongoDB indexes created on startup for all core collections (athletes, programs, interactions, users, refresh_tokens, etc.)
All function signatures properly converted from sync to async
All callers in routers correctly use await for async functions
seed_data_creation: Used existing seed data - no new seed data created
context_for_next_testing_agent: Data Architecture Refactor testing complete (iteration 239). All 19 backend tests passed verifying: (1) POST /api/auth/login - all 3 roles working, (2) GET /api/athletes - returns 11 athletes with pipeline_momentum computed, (3) GET /api/mission-control - coach sees 5 athletes, director sees 11 athletes with programStatus, (4) GET /api/program/intelligence - returns program health data with async compute, (5) GET /api/events - returns events list with upcoming/past sections, (6) GET /api/roster - returns roster data (director only), (7) GET /api/advocacy/recommendations - lists recommendations grouped by status, (8) GET /api/mission-control/signals - returns momentum signals from TTL cache, (9) GET /api/coach-inbox - returns inbox data, (10) GET /api/director/actions - returns director actions. Frontend verified: Coach dashboard shows 5 athletes, 5 needing attention, signals. Director dashboard shows 11 athletes, 7 needing attention, momentum improving. Athlete dashboard shows 6 schools tracked, 75% response rate. MongoDB indexes confirmed created on startup via logs.

backend_auth.POST /api/auth/login (athlete): PASS - returns token and user with role=athlete
backend_auth.POST /api/auth/login (director): PASS - returns token and user with role=director
backend_auth.POST /api/auth/login (coach): PASS - returns token and user with role=club_coach

backend_athletes.GET /api/athletes: PASS - returns 11 athletes with pipeline_momentum computed
backend_athletes.Athletes have required fields: PASS - id, full_name, grad_year, position present

backend_mission_control.GET /api/mission-control (coach): PASS - returns myRoster with 5+ athletes, role=club_coach
backend_mission_control.GET /api/mission-control (director): PASS - returns programStatus with totalAthletes=11, needsAttention

backend_events.GET /api/events: PASS - returns upcoming and past events with required fields

backend_advocacy.GET /api/advocacy/recommendations: PASS - returns grouped recommendations with stats

backend_derived_data.Mission Control has signals: PASS - programActivity present in director view
backend_derived_data.Mission Control has alerts: PASS - priorities/todays_summary present in coach view
backend_derived_data.GET /api/mission-control/signals: PASS - returns list of momentum signals

frontend_coach.Dashboard loads: PASS - shows 5 athletes, 5 needing attention, signals, events

frontend_director.Dashboard loads: PASS - shows 11 athletes, 7 needing attention, momentum improving

frontend_athlete.Dashboard loads: PASS - shows 6 schools tracked, 75% response rate, actions

mongodb_indexes.Indexes created on startup: PASS - logs show 'MongoDB indexes ensured on all core collections'

ttl_cache.Derived data refreshes: PASS - logs show 'derived data refreshed' with interventions, needing attention, signals

athlete_store.py.get_all(): Async function querying MongoDB directly - VERIFIED
athlete_store.py.get_by_id(): Async function querying MongoDB directly - VERIFIED
athlete_store.py._recompute_derived(): Reloads from DB and recomputes all derived caches - VERIFIED

startup.py.MongoDB indexes: create_index calls for athletes, programs, interactions, users, support_messages, notifications, coach_watch_alerts, refresh_tokens - VERIFIED

mission_control.py.All function calls use await: VERIFIED - get_athletes(), get_alerts(), get_signals(), get_needing_attention(), get_snapshot(), get_interventions()

program_engine.py.All compute functions async: VERIFIED - compute_program_health(), compute_readiness(), compute_event_effectiveness(), compute_advocacy_outcomes(), compute_support_load(), compute_all()
